title: berkheya johnstoniana
intro: Berkheya johnstoniana is a flowering plant species within the daisy family, known for its vibrant yellow flowers and edible leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and skin infections. The leaves of Berkheya johnstoniana have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal properties.
